title: Signature Bracelet Launch: Studio Retouch, White-Background E-Comm Set, Graded Hero, Expanded Social Banner & Vectorized Mark
one_line_ask: Turn the brand's raw studio prototype shots, wordmark, and lifestyle frame into a launch image kit: a clean white-background e-commerce set, a color-graded close-up hero, an expanded social banner, and a vectorized wordmark — then assemble everything on a Firefly board for sign-off.

issues: Background is off-white rather than fully transparent or pure white (acceptable per brief, but not ideal for direct use).
Slight softness to edges (acceptable per brief for a source asset).
Icon line weight is very thin compared to text, may need adjustment in refinement.
Canvas appears to be 1024x1024 square rather than the specified 2400x800 rectangular format
Background is off-white/near-white flat color rather than fully transparent PNG — acceptable as source input per brief
Knotted cord icon is slightly small relative to the text cap height, minor proportion imbalance
Thin line-art icon may lose detail at very small reproduction sizes
Slight warm colour cast overall (acceptable/intentional for golden hour brief)
Woman on right is partially cropped at frame edge — minor compositional note but acceptable for candid style
String lights are moderately bokeh but could be slightly softer for ideal separation
Food/dish detail in foreground is somewhat cluttered at bottom edge, though does not impede primary subject
Gold barrel clasp appears very clean/polished with minimal micro-scratching visible — slightly more render-like than raw capture, though acceptable as source asset
Background is fairly even; the 'slightly uneven/dull' quality is subtle but present
Tilt is minimal — barely perceptible, may need more deliberate crookedness for designer to have meaningful auto-straighten work to do
Contact shadow is faint but present — acceptable
Cord weave texture is well-rendered and photorealistic
